page.content: In the study of various tissues and their associated miRNAs, the Hippocampus contains let-7c, let-7c-2, miR-128a, miR-124a-1, miR-124a-3, miR-148b, miR-150, miR-199a, miR-217, miR-28, miR-29b-1, miR-329, and miR-331. The Olfactory bulb has let-7b, let-7c-1, let-7c-2, miR-10a, miR-16, miR-17, miR-21, miR-22, miR-28, miR-29c, miR-124a-1, miR-124a-3, miR-128a, miR-135b, miR-143, miR-148b, miR-150, miR-199a, miR-206, miR-217, miR-223, miR-29b-1, miR-329, miR-331, miR-429, and miR-451.

page.content: The Cortex includes let-7c-1, miR-10a, miR-21, miR-124a-1, miR-128a, miR-135b, miR-150, miR-199a, miR-217, miR-329, and miR-451. The Hypothalamus consists of miR-17, miR-29c, miR-124a-1, miR-128a, miR-150, miR-199a, miR-217, miR-223, miR-329, and miR-429. The Spinal cord features miR-28, miR-217, miR-218-1, miR-329, and miR-331. The Brain stem includes let-7c-1, miR-17, miR-135b, miR-150, miR-199a, miR-218-1, miR-223, and miR-329. The Dorsal root ganglion comprises let-7c, miR-17, miR-145, miR-150, miR-199a, miR-223, miR-365, and miR-451. In terms of tumor growth inhibition, the High sensitivity category shows >95% inhibition at 200% TDC* and >70% at 25% TDC*, while Moderate sensitivity exhibits >95% at 200% TDC* and 50–70% at 25% TDC*, Low sensitivity indicates >95% at 200% TDC* and <50% at 25% TDC*, the unspecified category reveals <95% at 200% TDC* and >50% at 25% TDC*, and the Resistant group shows <95% at 200% TDC* and <50% at 25% TDC*.
